headline: UBS Remains Neutral on Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO), Lifts PT
summary: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) is one of the best big tech stocks to buy according to Wall Street analysts. UBS lifted the price target on Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) to $1,250 from $1,110 on June 16 and maintained a Neutral rating on the shares. Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) also received a rating update from Clear Street […]

headline: FICO UK Credit Card Market Report: April 2026
summary: LONDON, June 24, 2026--New credit card data analysis by global analytics software leader FICO (NYSE: FICO) has found that spending rose in April, following typical Easter behaviour. However, we are seeing a strong trend downwards with the percentage of balance being paid, and this is driving up overall balances. The percentage of balance paid fell for the third month in a row and late payments increased year-on-year, balances returned to record high levels. This marks a notable shift from the im
